testsAreBehavioral.details: Tests focus on WHAT the system should do (behavioral requirements) rather than HOW it's implemented. Examples: 'should accept Content[] format', 'should preserve responseId metadata', 'should maintain conversation coherence'

propertyBasedTesting.details: 7 property-based tests using fast-check out of 16 total tests (43.75% > 30% requirement)

testsFailingAsExpected.details: Tests are properly failing in TDD Red phase. 11 out of 16 tests failing with expected assertion errors and property failures, indicating they are testing unimplemented functionality

buildStatus.details: Build fails due to type errors in integration tests and existing 'any' type violations in OpenAIProvider.ts. This is expected during TDD phase.

lintStatus.details: Lint errors include 'any' type violations in OpenAIProvider.ts and integration test issues. Expected during migration preparation phase.

requirements.REQ-003.1: Content[] format acceptance - covered by behavioral tests
requirements.REQ-003.2: ResponseId metadata preservation - covered by specific test cases

testQuality.tddCompliance: PASS - Tests written before implementation, currently failing appropriately
testQuality.coverageTargets: Defined through property-based testing and behavioral scenarios

criticalFindings: Migration tests properly follow TDD methodology
Tests are behavioral and focus on requirements
